title: System configuration schema
description: Look up the live system configuration JSON Schema—definitions, fields, constraints, defaults, enums, and examples—on a stable deep-linkable docs route.

whatItCovers.title: What It Covers
whatItCovers.body: This reference shows the live system configuration JSON Schema from the you-agent-factory API package. Use it to look up definitions, fields, constraints, defaults, enums, and examples for operator and system config. Field and definition descriptions come from the package schema itself.

schemaLookup.title: Schema Lookup
schemaLookup.body: Browse the complete System configuration schema below. Filter by definition or field name, follow $ref links to related definitions, and copy deep links to any definition or field anchor on this page.
